drinks.strInstructions: Fill a glass with ice, add ginger ale and a splash of grenadine. Garnish with a maraschino cherry.
Fill a glass with ice, add cola and grenadine. Stir gently and garnish with a maraschino cherry.
Muddle mint leaves with sugar and lime juice. Add ice and top with soda water. Garnish with mint sprig.
Blend pineapple juice, coconut cream, and ice until smooth. Pour into glass and garnish with pineapple wedge.
Combine tomato juice, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, and seasonings. Serve over ice with celery stick.
Shake orange juice, lemon juice, and pineapple juice with ice. Strain into glass and top with soda water.
Combine cranberry juice, grapefruit juice, and peach nectar over ice. Stir and garnish with orange slice.
Muddle cucumber and mint with lime juice. Add ice, top with soda water and ginger beer.
Pour peach nectar into flute, top with sparkling apple cider or sparkling water.
Combine equal parts iced tea and lemonade over ice. Garnish with lemon slice.
Layer orange juice, grenadine, and pineapple juice over ice. Top with soda water.
Muddle mixed berries with simple syrup. Add lemon juice and ice, top with soda water.
Blend watermelon chunks with lime juice and ice. Pour into glass, top with soda water.
Combine peach nectar, orange juice, and ginger ale over ice. Garnish with peach slice.
Blend mango juice, orange juice, and coconut cream with ice. Pour into glass.
Add ice, pour in flavored syrup and cream. Top with club soda and stir gently.
Combine lemon juice and simple syrup in flute. Top with sparkling water and garnish with lemon twist.
Combine orange juice, lemonade, and cranberry juice in punch bowl. Add ice and top with ginger ale before serving.
Combine rose water, lemon juice, and simple syrup. Top with soda water and garnish with rose petals.
Combine elderflower cordial and cucumber slices in glass. Top with soda water and ice.
Brew strong black tea, chill. Combine equal parts tea and lemonade over ice.
Brew green tea, chill. Add honey, lemon juice, and ice. Top with soda water.
Brew chai tea, chill. Add milk, simple syrup, and ice. Top with soda water.
Brew black tea, chill. Add peach nectar and ice. Garnish with peach slice.
Brew mint tea, chill. Add honey and lime juice. Serve over ice with fresh mint.
Heat apple cider with cinnamon stick, cloves, and orange slice. Serve warm.
Muddle ginger slices with honey. Add lemon juice and ice. Top with ginger beer.
Combine apple juice, cinnamon syrup, and lemon juice over ice. Top with soda water.
Crush cardamom pods, add rose water and simple syrup. Top with soda water and ice.
Combine turmeric powder, honey, lemon juice, and hot water. Stir until dissolved, add ice, top with soda water.
Combine fresh lemon juice, simple syrup, and water over ice. Garnish with lemon wheel.
Combine orange juice, vanilla syrup, and cream over ice. Stir gently.
Blend pineapple juice, coconut milk, and ice. Pour into glass, garnish with pineapple.
Muddle strawberries with sugar. Add lemon juice and water. Serve over ice with mint.
Combine blue curacao syrup, lemonade, and soda water over ice. Garnish with lemon.
Combine cranberry juice and grapefruit juice over ice. Top with soda water.
Combine grapefruit juice, lime juice, and simple syrup over ice. Top with soda water.
Combine melon juice, orange juice, and soda water over ice. Garnish with melon ball.
Muddle kiwi with sugar. Add lime juice and soda water. Serve over ice.
Combine passion fruit juice, orange juice, and lime juice over ice. Top with soda water.
Muddle cucumber slices with mint. Add lime juice and simple syrup. Top with soda water.
Muddle raspberries with sugar. Add lemon juice and water. Serve over ice.
Combine pomegranate juice and lime juice over ice. Top with ginger ale.
Brew lavender tea, chill. Add lemon juice, honey, and water. Serve over ice.
Combine cherry juice, vanilla syrup, and soda water over ice. Garnish with cherry.
Combine apple juice, ginger syrup, and lemon juice over ice. Top with soda water.
Combine pear juice, vanilla syrup, and lime juice over ice. Top with soda water.
Combine coconut water, lime juice, and simple syrup over ice. Top with soda water.
Heat apple cider with maple syrup and cinnamon. Serve warm with cinnamon stick.
Brew hibiscus tea, chill. Add honey and lime juice. Serve over ice with mint.
Blend mango, pineapple, and coconut cream with ice. Pour into glass.
Muddle mixed berries with lemon juice. Add simple syrup and top with sparkling water.
Combine orange juice, rose water, and honey over ice. Top with soda water.
Combine grape juice, lemon juice, and simple syrup over ice. Top with soda water.
Combine apricot nectar, lemon juice, and simple syrup over ice. Top with soda water.
Muddle plum slices with sugar. Add lemon juice and water. Serve over ice.
Muddle fig with honey. Add lemon juice and top with soda water over ice.
Blend papaya, orange juice, and coconut milk with ice. Pour into glass.
Muddle lychees with mint. Add lime juice and top with soda water over ice.
Blend dragon fruit with lime juice and coconut water. Pour over ice.
Muddle basil leaves with sugar. Add lemon juice and water. Serve over ice.
Muddle sage leaves with grapefruit juice. Add honey and top with soda water.
Muddle Thai basil with lime and sugar. Add coconut water and ice.
Muddle rosemary with grapefruit juice. Add simple syrup and top with soda water.
Muddle thyme with lemon juice and honey. Add water and serve over ice.
Combine chocolate syrup, milk, and mint extract over ice. Top with soda water.
Brew chai tea, add steamed milk, vanilla syrup, and honey. Serve warm.
Combine apple juice, caramel syrup, and sea salt over ice. Top with cream soda.
Heat milk with vanilla and marshmallow. Top with toasted marshmallow.
Heat milk with chocolate and marshmallow. Top with graham cracker crumbs.
Heat apple cider with butterscotch syrup and cinnamon. Serve warm.
Heat milk with pumpkin puree, spices, and maple syrup. Top with whipped cream.
Heat milk with cocoa powder and sugar. Top with whipped cream and chocolate shavings.
Heat milk with white chocolate chips and vanilla. Top with whipped cream.
Heat milk with chocolate syrup and peppermint extract. Top with crushed candy cane.
Combine milk, chocolate syrup, and soda water. Stir gently to create foam.
Pour root beer over vanilla ice cream in a tall glass.
Pour orange soda over vanilla ice cream. Garnish with orange slice.
Fill glass with ice, add cola and grenadine. Garnish with cherry and orange.
Combine pineapple, orange, and cranberry juices in punch bowl. Add ginger ale and fruit slices.
Combine mango, pineapple, and orange juices. Add grenadine and ginger ale. Float fruit slices.
Layer grenadine, orange juice, and soda water over ice. Garnish with orange slice.
Combine pineapple, coconut, and orange juices over ice. Top with soda water.
Muddle strawberries with sugar. Add lemon juice and top with soda water.
Combine orange, lemon, and lime juices with simple syrup. Top with soda water.
Pour peach puree into flute, top with sparkling cider. Garnish with peach slice.
Combine orange juice and sparkling cider in flute. Garnish with orange twist.
Add crème de cassis syrup to flute, top with sparkling cider.
Combine grape juice, orange juice, and lemon juice. Add fruit slices and chill.
Heat apple cider with cinnamon, cloves, and orange. Serve warm.
Heat water with honey, lemon juice, and spices. Serve warm with lemon slice.
Heat apple cider with orange juice, spices, and sugar. Serve warm.
Heat apple cider with butter, brown sugar, and spices. Top with whipped cream.
Brew chamomile tea, add honey and lemon. Serve warm before bed.
Heat milk with lavender syrup and vanilla. Top with dried lavender.
Heat milk with turmeric, ginger, honey, and cinnamon. Serve warm.
Heat milk with beetroot juice, honey, and vanilla. Serve warm with cinnamon.
Whisk matcha powder with hot water, add steamed milk and honey.
Combine turmeric, ginger, honey, and hot water. Stir, add ice, top with soda water.
Combine activated charcoal, lemon juice, honey, and water. Serve over ice.
Combine kombucha, pineapple juice, and ginger. Serve over ice with mint.
Combine coconut water, lime juice, and honey. Add sea salt and ice.
Brew ashwagandha tea, chill. Add lemon juice, honey, and soda water.
Brew valerian and chamomile tea. Add honey and lemon. Serve warm.
Brew green tea, chill. Add ginger, lemon, and honey. Serve over ice.
Combine ginger juice, turmeric, lemon juice, and honey. Stir and drink quickly.
Combine apple cider vinegar, lemon juice, honey, and water. Serve over ice.
Combine watermelon juice, lime juice, and coconut water. Serve over ice.
Combine kefir, pineapple juice, and ginger. Serve over ice with mint.
Brew passionflower tea, add honey and lavender. Serve warm.
